sections.title: Projects
sections: This section highlights active and developing projects, giving a quick overview of what each one is for, what stage it is in, and where it is headed as the systems continue to grow.

items.title: Themadhood.github.io
description: A scalable web platform designed to host and organize all Themadhood projects and systems.
Built as a fast recovery solution after previous hosting platforms became unavailable, with plans to evolve into a full-stack system.
about: A scalable recovery-first web platform with a planned transition to full-stack architecture.

items.title: Meal Planner
description: An automated meal planning web app designed to generate meal plans, shopping lists, and recipe adjustments based on user settings.
Built first as a test database and Python prototype before moving into a full web app with accounts, subscriptions, family sharing, and recipe management.
about: A subscription-based meal planning app focused on automated weekly planning, reusable recipes, shopping lists, and user-controlled food preferences.

items.title: Prism Bloom Exercise Website
description: A public website for Prism Bloom Exercise, a free outdoor exercise community focused on events, routes, calendars, and community links.
The site includes pages for general information, offered events, self-guided routes, and social/calendar links, with events and routes kept up to date through daily generated JSON data.
about: A lightweight community website for Prism Bloom Exercise that helps visitors learn about the group, find events, follow routes, and connect through Discord, social media, and calendars.

items.title: Evolutionary-Tree
description: Stores collections of real, fantasy, and other kinds of data in one place.
Designed to make evolutionary paths and related information easier to explore, compare, and understand across both science and fantasy settings.
about: A flexible data project for exploring evolutionary paths and related information across science and fantasy settings.

features: Structured storage for real and fantasy data
Clear viewing of evolutionary paths and related information
statusDetails: Stored information categories and layout are still being refined.

items.title: Project Roos Closet
description: A private application currently being developed as part of a client project.
Designed with flexibility and long-term maintainability while respecting client confidentiality.
about: A custom software project created for a client with a focus on reliability and future growth.
Specific features and implementation details are intentionally withheld.

items.title: Project Roos Style
description: A custom client application currently under active development.
Built with an emphasis on scalability, maintainability, and a clean user experience.
about: A privately commissioned software project developed around client requirements.
Project-specific functionality and design details remain confidential.
